title: ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. filicaulis
intro: Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. filicaulis is a subspecies of the Ziziphora clinopodioides plant, commonly known as Persian mint or Iranian mint, which belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This herb is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ziziphora clinopodioides subsp. filicaulis include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Middle East and other parts of Asia.
